creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #6)
The reduced test case posted in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/48546 is fixed by https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/702d5de4380b1e1554e5b90863093c3a57f76f70, possibly as a side-effect of upstream enabling opaque pointers by default.

I think it should be safe to compile the port with either clang >= 15 from base, from an llvm >= 15 port.
